title: NHKマイルカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We're here! The classic year! The NHK Mile Cup!
Who will be the new! Mile! Master?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Here we are, Trainer! The G1 race we've been
aiming for!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Next comes the Japan Cup, and then...
I take off for the world stage!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What's more, this race is where I say farewell to
everyone.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yes. This is where our paths diverge. I'm on a
different path from the Derby group.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
If I said I wasn't gonna miss them, I'd be lying. I'm
definitely gonna miss them!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But I don't have any regrets. This is my choice.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Someone, somewhere once said, "Sometimes you
just can't help yourself."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's why I won't be bringin' these tears into this
race!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm the condor of the world, and I'm gonna prove
it here, in the race that Pearl won before me!
